messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0040",
  "title": "画面与音效表现",
  "page_index": 20,
  "page_range": "20"
}

Section text:
画面与音效表现

message.content: This section, titled "画面与音效表现" (Visual and Audio Performance) on page 20, contains only the section heading with no accompanying content. It can answer basic structural or navigational questions regarding the document's organization and the presence of a dedicated topic for visual and audio evaluation. It does not contain any specific entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types, and therefore cannot support retrieval for detailed factual, analytical, or technical queries on this subject.
